diagrams.title: MDP Agent-Environment Interaction Loop
diagrams.description: Shows the cyclic interaction between agent and environment in an MDP
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the basic feedback loop: Agent observes state, takes action, environment responds with new state and reward, repeat

diagrams.title: Grid World MDP Example
diagrams.description: A simple 2D grid showing states, actions (directions), rewards, and transitions
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how MDP components work in a concrete problem; computing value functions and optimal policy

diagrams.title: Bellman Update Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how value propagates backward through time steps
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the recursive nature of Bellman equations: V(s) depends on V(s') and vice versa

diagrams.title: Value Function as Tree
diagrams.description: Shows value of state as sum of discounted future rewards
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how future rewards contribute to current state value with decreasing importance
